chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-145 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.03.2026. Mr. Bilawal Bajeer, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh alongwith Inspector Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP, Hyderabad and ASI Masood Ali Incharge P.P Pabban, Hyderabad. ***************************************** Mr. Zeeshan Ali Burdi, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.4 to 8, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that after filing the instant Petition by the Petitioners, the Petitioner No.1 (Mst. Saira) has been forcibly confined by their parents. Since, the instant Petition pertains to a free will and the lady Petitioner (Mst. Saira) appeared before this Court on 19.02.2026 submitted that she has contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2 (Ameer Ali) out of her own free will and choice without any compulsion, coercion, pressure or inducement and she had also produced her Nikahnama and affidavit of free will, therefore, no FIR shall be registered with regard to alleged abduction of Mst. Saira. However, learned counsel for the Petitioner is at liberty to file separate application U/s 491 Cr.P.C before competent forum under the law. Accordingly, the instant Petition stands disposed of alongwith pending application(s), if any. Let a copy of this order be communicated to concerned SSP and SHO. JUDGE Ali.
